metadata.description: Repo forensics → a self-learning Claude Code ops skill, forged by a local Ollama swarm with an Oracle validator.

plugins.name: llama-smith
plugins.description: Point it at a repo; a swarm of local Ollama Smiths reads how it deploys, leaks, and breaks, the Oracle validates each finding against its cited file, and a self-learning <repo>-matrix skill is forged.
